feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP HANA Rebates: Partner determination for Contract Rebate
entry.content:
Hi Community!

I have a customer in SAP HANA requesting that in Contract Rebates could be by SHIP TO PARTY instead of PI Invoicing Party.  In configuration I see that I can change the partner but I'm not sure if all Invoice documents will be taken into account since Invoice documents have not Ship to party partner.

Could you please help me to understand if I change Contract Rebates partner to SH will be take all Invoice document for Settlement?

 

Regards

Mirtha

entry.title: Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 000 not filled error for in CJ88
entry.content:
We are trying to run settlement of network activity on WBS through CJ88 transaction. Profit center is defined on WBS level and network level as well. System is giving error Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 000 not filled.
Please guide.

entry.title: DRC Portugal PT_WHT_M30 in Private
entry.content:
Hi,

Please, I am trying to implement DRC Portugal PT_WHT_M30 in Private Cloud, but the instructions about this are a bit lacking. At the moment I was able to generate the PDF, but I need to know how to create the file in XML and understand why exempt suppliers who have a Portuguese NIF are disregarded.

Best regards.

entry.title: CTS_PROJECT needed for Transport of copies in ADT
entry.content:
Dear Members,

in SAP GUI for Transport (Workbench/Customizing) a CTS_PROJECT is obligatory. However for Transport of Copies, there is no such field to be filled in of course. So far so good.

I am having the issue, that when I want to create a transport of copy in Transport Organiser (ADT), I am asked to fill in a CTS_PROJECT, but the field is inactive. Therefore I cannot create the transport of copy. A bit of a catch 22.
Does anybody have an idea how to solve this issue?
I can of course use the GUI to get the job done, but it is a bit disheartening regarding ADT usage.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: WBS status is released and CRTD at the same time
entry.content: multiple WBS elements have system status CRTD and REL active at the same time. This results in errors at the time of Goods Issuance and Goods Receipt. How to resolve this issue? There is no user status activated in the system. I have tried to re-release the WBS but still same error persists. Please guide.

entry.title: Issue with Credit Management Not Generated Automatically for Certain Business Partners in SAP S/4HAN
entry.content:
The topic is Credit Management.

For some Business Partners, when I create a sales order through VA01, the system does not generate the credit commitment. However, if I later run the credit rebuild program UKM_COMMITMENT_REBUILD, the order is correctly picked up and included in the credit management calculation.

I performed a test in the test environment, for the same BP, and there it works automatically.

For other BPs, the calculation works automatically as expected.
The sales orders are always created using the same document type and the same transaction.

I also carried out a comparison between BPs where the calculation works automatically and the one where it does not, and I did not find any differences. The configuration is the same.

Has anyone ever encountered this type of issue?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: ABAP Runtime Error on Project
entry.content: Reservation generated from a specific network in WBS. User wants to create PR instead of a reservation. Now, when user tried to change the item category for component in network system gave ABAP runtime error.  Ever since this, nothing can be changed or even displayed in the project. Project is opened in CJ20N but instantly system gives ABAP runtime error. What to do?

entry.title: SAP Ariba Invoicing (formerly SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management) for S/4HANA Cloud Private Editio
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

The Process Navigator and SAP Help contain references stating that SAP Ariba Invoicing (formerly SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management) is also available for S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. However, there does not appear to be an official price list for this. In short: Is SAP Ariba Invoicing now available for the Private Edition or not? If not, when will it be available?

Best regards,

Patrick

entry.title: How to activate the option CREATE on report definition ID F2131 DRC
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I'm a functional consultant and I'm trying to create a new report definition with XML option, but the option CREATE SCHEMA ID is unavailable. My version is SAP Private Cloud 2023, someone know how to fix it?.

Best regards

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

entry.title: Audit Trail in /ECRS/RP_EDIT – Availability of Old and New Values Intrastat Reporting
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question regarding transaction /ECRS/RP_EDIT used for Intrastat reporting. In general, changes to reporting items are logged in table /ECRS/RPIT. However, the log only records the date and the user who made the change.

Is it possible to see what exactly was changed — specifically the old and new values?
Is this information logged as well? If so, how can it be accessed?

Thanks and regards

entry.title: Joule for S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

We are planning to integrate Joule with S/4HANA Private cloud.  Please clarify below questions:

Does customer have both options as below? or only option B?

A. Integrate Joule with Work Zone Site 

B. Integration Joule with S/4HANA Fiori Launchpad

 

SAP documentation ( https://help.sap.com/docs/joule/integrating-joule-with-sap/configure-destinations ) asks to create below destinations:

  1. Design time destination
  2. Runtime destination - Documentation says Authentication method= No Authentication. Is this wrong as we should have Principal Propagation for this destination ?
  3. Separate destination for retrieving SAP Card nominations - This destination has fixed nameIdFormat as tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:emailAddress
    Does this mean we have to use only email address as attribute for principal propagation?
  4. Single Sign On destination (S4HANA_PCE_SSO): What is use of this destination? Why cant we leverage Runtime destination ?
  5. RFC destination for Identity Provisioning -
    Do we need to assign any roles to users in BTP? or only replication is needed?
    If customer has different Identity Governance solution to provision users in IAS/BTP, do we need this step?

Then documentation talks about BTP Work Zone setup only up to step of exposing the content. 

Is this required only for Joule to use navigational service? Does customer need to pay for users in Work Zone?

 

Regards,

VP

entry.title: RISE Private Cloud – On-prem subnet unreachable after ISP failover
entry.content:
We are running SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud (our Hyperscaler is AWS) connected to on-premise via Direct Connect with dual ISP backup.

During primary ISP failure, connectivity to a specific on-premise subnet is lost while other subnets remain reachable.

This suggests a potential routing asymmetry or selective route propagation issue during failover.

We would like to validate routing symmetry and reachability from the SAP cloud side.

Questions:

  • Is it possible to execute traceroute or TCP connectivity tests from SAP managed application servers in AWS environments?
  • Is this typically handled by SAP Cloud Operations via incident ticket?
  • Are there recommended validation procedures from SAP side during customer ISP failover scenarios?

entry.title: nJIT S2P with External Replenishment (Component Material and IM Managed Warehouse)
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am trying to set up nJIT Supply to Production Process with external replenishment, considering component material and an IM-Managed Warehouse with TM integration.

Standard process with all variants can be found in the following link: End-To-End (E2E) External Replenishment Process for JIT/JIS Call | SAP Help Portal

I was able to:

  1. Create Purchase Scheduling Agreement
  2. Maintain Delivery schedule and trigger Freight Unit creation on TM side
  3. Create JIT Call and trigger SOAP message to the supplier
  4. Create Consignment Order with reference to the JIT call and Freight Order on TM side and trigger Inbound Delivery creation on LE side

However, JIT Call internal status is not updated to "Inbound Delivery Created". It is still with status "JIT Call created".

Additional information: JIT control cycle creates with standard action control S2P_ACTRL & Logistics Integration Relevance "Component Materials" and purchase scheduling agreement assigned.

Any hints on what is missing here?

Thanks!

Rita

entry.title: El movimiento 687 SiT, ¿está vigente en la versión SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2020 Rise?
entry.content:
He visto que el movimiento 687 es el que da tratamiento perfecto a la mercancía que está en tránsito camino al cliente (tratamiento estándar para sacar la mercancía del almacén, ponerla "en tránsito" para después descargar al costo de ventas al momento de la confirmación de entrega al cliente).

¿Me pueden ayudar a averiguar si esta opción está vigente para la versión SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2020 Rise, por favor?

Les agradecería si me pudieran referir a la documentación técnica correspondiente. 

Muchas gracias.-

entry.title: request assistance regarding Fiori activation in our DS4 system
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We would like to request assistance regarding Fiori activation in our DS4 system.

Currently, SAP Fiori has already been activated in client 100.  
However, Fiori Launchpad and related Fiori content are not activated in client 110 and client 500.

System information:
System ID: DS4
Clients: 100 (working), 110 and 500 (not activated)

Requirement:
We would like to activate SAP Fiori Launchpad and related services for client 110 and client 500 so that users in these clients can access Fiori applications.

Could you please advise the recommended procedure to activate Fiori in these additional clients?

Thank you.

entry.title: Clean Core: architecture challenge or decision-making challenge?
entry.content:
Hi everyone! We recently wrote a longer post for the SAP Community blog we argue that the biggest challenge behind Clean Care is organizational rather than architectural.

In many projects we've seen, the pressure to customize usually reflects problems in terms of decision-making, lack of governance, or even some difficulty to align stakeholders around standard processes.

We'd be really interested in hearing how others have experienced this issue that is more human than technical. Which was the hardest part of dealing with Clean Core in your projects? Were the issues -if there were any- technical or more about organizational agreement?

entry.title: Financial Statement Version for Profit & Loss Format in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud (Release 2023) and need to configure a Profit & Loss report format using Financial Statement Version (FSV).

I am new to SAP S/4HANA and have already reviewed the available SAP Help documentation and notes, but I would appreciate guidance from experts on the best approach to structure the FSV for P&L reporting.

I will also attach a sample format with dummy data below image for reference that we need to replicate in the system.

Could someone please guide on the recommended format or share any relevant notes or examples?

Gross Profit and Operating Profit are calculated figures – how can these be replicated or configured in FSV?

Same like Balance Sheet report – Profit/Period is a calculated figure – how can this be represented in FSV?

 

 

Thank you for your support.

 

 

Best regards,

silambu

entry.title: Financial Statement Version for Profit & Loss Format in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud (Release 2023) and need to configure a Profit & Loss report in EBITDA format using Financial Statement Version (FSV).

I am new to SAP S/4HANA and have already reviewed the available SAP Help documentation and notes, but I would appreciate guidance from experts on the best approach to structure the FSV for EBITDA reporting.

I will also attach a sample P&L EBITDA format with below image with dummy data for reference that we need to replicate in the system.

Could someone please guide on the recommended FSV format or share any relevant notes or examples?

Gross Profit and Operating Profit are calculated figures – how can these be replicated or configured in FSV?

Also Balance Sheet Report version – Period Profit is a calculated figure – how can this be represented in FSV?

Thank you for your support.

 

Regards,

silambarasan R

entry.title: SAP Private Cloud FUE
entry.content:
If a license type is maintained directly in SU01, it is correctly fetched in table, and FUE can be calculated accordingly.
However, in cases where the license type is not maintained in SU01, should such users still be considered in the FUE calculation?

entry.title: MultiLevel BOM Report for all Materials
entry.content:
Hello,

For manufacturing and budget purposes, we need to have a table with all the MultiLevel BOMs, including the semi-finished goods.

As of now, we have built it in our external data warehouse, but we want to study the feasibility of generating this data in SAP.

Does anybody has any feedback regarding this topic?

We are in S4/HANA on private cloud.

Could it be a CDS View? Should we build a table that we refresh regularly via an ABAP program? any other option?

Thank you

Julien
